name: Stuffed Chili Rellenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the chilies and plan for about 4 per person.
2. Open each chili flat.
3. In a well-buttered glass oven dish, place a layer of chilies.
4. Dust the Jack cheese with a small amount of flour.
5. Mix together the crab (or shrimp) and Jack cheese.
6. Place a thin layer of this mixture over the bottom layer of chilies.
7. Place another layer of chilies on top and repeat until finished with a top layer of chilies.
8. Bake in a 375°F oven for 7-10 minutes, uncovered.
9. Remove from the oven and reduce heat to 300°F.
10. Mix together the batter (doubling if necessary) and pour over the chilies.
11. Add the grated cheddar cheese and bake, covered, until done. The dish is ready when a knife inserted in the middle comes out relatively clean. If the center does not set up completely after about 30 minutes, serve with a salad and enjoy with corn.
